reason: Frontend checklist and required guideline entry point for verification.
Verify the implementation uses narrow shared components, preserves copy, and keeps accessibility patterns.
Verify task actions and composable boundaries are not duplicated or changed incorrectly.
Verify new component/helper APIs stay typed without broad assertions.
Verify lint, type-check, build expectations, and forbidden WebUI runtime patterns.
Verify abstractions are justified by repeated code and do not add more complexity than they remove.
